title: hypochaeris radicata subsp. glabra
intro: Hypochaeris radicata subsp. glabra, also known as Smooth Cat's Ear, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the dandelion family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The plant's leaves, roots, and flowers are used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, kidney stones, and skin conditions, offering benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting urinary health. Hypochaeris radicata subsp. glabra can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in some herbal remedies for its perceived health benefits.
